text:
(In reply to Ed Maste from comment #1)
Hi,

I though that the link to Twitter showed all but seems not.

The old loader showed list of BEs like on page 24 of this PDF file: http://is.gd/BEADM

The new loader does not display list but the 'thing' showed on the Twitter link.

Regards,
vermaden
